name: Grecian Chicken and Potatoes
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C). Place the chicken in a large shallow baking pan. Combine the lemon juice, garlic salt, pepper, and dried oregano; pour over the chicken. Sprinkle with seasoned salt. Bake uncovered for 1 - 1/4 hours or until chicken is tender and juices run clear.
For potatoes, place the onion in an ungreased 9 x 13 baking pan. Arrange the red potatoes in rows over the onion, with slices slightly overlapping. Combine the remaining ingredients; pour over the potatoes. Bake uncovered at 350°F (175°C) for 1 hour and 20 minutes or until tender.
Serve hot.
